title: AI Realism
description: I made a Realistic Texturepack with the help of AI
body:
I've started a new project, making a realistic-looking texture pack.

All textures were made using AI, though some needed editing.

![Collage of textures](https://i.imgur.com/z5jdABB.png)

![Image of texturepack in use](https://i.imgur.com/iY4ZSoi.png)

Version 3 includes:

- Grass Block
- Dirt
- Stone
- Sand
- Oak Log
- Birch Log
- Oak Leaves
- Birch Leaves
- Diamond Ore
- Copper Ore
- Diamond Block
- Barrel
- All wool colors
- Andesite
- Granite
- Diorite
- Bricks
- Grass

Version 4 includes:

- Everything in version 3 
- Added all ore texture(also Deepslate and Nether ores)
- Added Iron, Gold, Lapis, Emerald block
- Bone Block top and side
- Deepslate top and side
- Netherrack
- Sandstone

Version 5 includes:

- Everything in version 4
- Added Clay Texture
- Added Oak Log Top Texture
- Improved Grass Block Texture
- Improved Dirt Texture
- Improved Oak Log Texture

Version 6 includes:

- Everything in version 5
- Added Water Texture
- Added All Copper Stages
- Added Budding and Normal Amethyst Texture
- Added Smooth Basalt Texture
- Added Calcite Texture
- Added Birch Log Top Texture
- Improved Birch Log Texture
- Improved Birch Planks Texture

Version 7 includes:

- Everything in version 6
- Added End Stone Texture
- Added Dark Oak Log Leaves, Log and Planks Texture
- Added Moss Texture
- Added All Mushroom Block Textures
- Added Stone Bricks Texture
- Added Magma Texture
- Added Crying Obsidian Texture
- Added Obsidian Texture
- Added Water Texture

Version 8 includes:

- Everything in version 7
- Added Lava Textures
- Added Tuff Texture
- Added Glow Lichen Texture
- Added Spruce Log Texture

Version 9 includes:

- Everything in version 8
- Added New Stone Texture
- Added Bedrock Texture
- Added Poppy Texture
- Added Spruce Planks Texture
- Added Vine Texture
- Added Acacia Log Texture
- Added Acacia Leaves Texture
- Added Snow Texture
- Added Spruce Leaves Texture
- Added Powder Snow Texture
- Added Cobweb Texture
- Added Mossy Cobbblestone Texture
- Added Farmland Texture
- Added Farmland Moist Texture
- Added Oak Trapdoor Texture

Version 10 includes:

- Everything in version 9
- Added Dripstone Block Texture
- Added Nether Portal Texture
- Added Smooth Stone Texture
- Improved Grass Texture
- Added Cherry Leaves Texture
- Added Cherry Log Texture

Version 11 includes:

- Everything in version 10
- Added Large Fern Top Texture
- Added Large Fern Bottom Texture 
- Added Fern Texture
- Added Coarse Dirt Texture
- Added Podzol Side Texture
- Added Podzol Top Texture
- Added Sandstone Texture
- Added Sandstone Bottom
- Added Sandstone Top
- Added Glowstone Texture
- Improved Water Still Texture
- Improved Water Flow Texture
- Added Blue Ice Texture
- Added Packed Ice Texture

Version 12 includes:

- Everything in version 11
- Added Light Blue, Pink, Yellow, And Lime Concrete and Concrete Powder Texture
- Added Red Concrete Texture
- Added Tall Grass Top And Bottom Texture
- Tweaked Grass Block Top And Side Color And Texture
- Tweaked Grass Color And Texture
- Added Sunflower Front Texture

Version 13 includes:

- Everything in version 12
- Fixed Grass Texture Not Working
- Added Bookshelf Texture
- Added Cracked Stone Brick Texture
- Added Mossy Stone Brick Texture
- Added Crafting Table Texture
- Added Stripped Oak Wood Texture
- Added Dirt Path Texture
- Improved Oak Planks Texture
- Added Hay Block Texture

Version 14 includes:

- Everything in version 13
- Added Cactus Texture
- Added Coral Blocks Texture
- Added Pumpkin Texture

 More blocks coming soon!
